Title: Relates to adjudications and owner liability for a violation of traffic-control signal indications in the village of Pelham Manor
Summary: Extends provisions of law permitting adjudications and owner liability for a violation of traffic-control signal indications in the village of Pelham Manor.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 460 of the laws of 2021 amending the vehicle and traffic law, the general municipal law and the public officers law relating to certain traffic infractions and notices of liability and amending the vehicle and traffic law relating to adjudications and owner liability for a violation of traffic-control signal indications in the village of Pelham Manor, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
